sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3073" key="a)kentro/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκεντ-ρότης</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n3073.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">absence from a cardinal point</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Demoph.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Jul.Laod.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5(1).189</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
